hooks.command: gapp_version=$(grep __version__ "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/gapp/__init__.py" | cut -d'"' -f2); cached_version=$(cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/installed_version" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$gapp_version" != "$cached_version" ]; then cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && python3 -m pip install -t "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/site-packages" -r requirements.txt && echo "$gapp_version" > "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/installed_version"; fi
